title: Add Rent Property support and integrate official contact information

requirements.text: Add a dedicated 'Rent' property category throughout the application. The Search Bar on the homepage already has a 'Rent' tab — ensure it correctly filters and navigates to the property listing page showing only rental listings. Add 'For Rent' as a valid listing type/status in the backend data model alongside existing statuses. Allow users to post properties listed as 'For Rent' via the Post Property multi-step form by including a 'Listing Type' field (Buy / Rent). Display a 'For Rent' badge on property cards and detail pages for rental listings.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend Property type includes a listingType field with values: 'sale' | 'rent'
Post Property form includes a Listing Type selector (Buy / Rent) in the Basic Info step
Searching with the 'Rent' tab on the homepage search bar navigates to the listing page pre-filtered for rental properties
Property listing page sidebar filters include a 'Listing Type' filter (All / For Sale / For Rent)
Property cards display a 'For Rent' badge when listingType is 'rent'
Property detail page shows the listing type prominently (e.g., 'For Rent' label near the price)

requirements.text: Update all site-wide contact information to reflect the official Aventra Estates details: phone numbers +917020271267 and +919535511171, email aventraestate@gmail.com, and office address 'Near Goodluck Apartment, Kondhwa, Pune 411048'. This information must appear in the Footer component and on any Contact / About section. WhatsApp quick-contact links should use +917020271267 as the default number.

quotes: Office address near goodluck apartment kondhwa pune 411048

acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays both phone numbers: +917020271267 and +919535511171
Footer displays email address aventraestate@gmail.com as a clickable mailto link
Footer displays office address: Near Goodluck Apartment, Kondhwa, Pune 411048
WhatsApp floating/CTA links use +917020271267 as the default contact number
Agent card default contact info (if no agent is assigned) falls back to the official contact numbers and email

constraints: Do not break existing property listing, filtering, or admin approval flows
Immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components) must not be modified
All contact details must match exactly: +917020271267, +919535511171, aventraestate@gmail.com, Near Goodluck Apartment Kondhwa Pune 411048
nonGoals: Building a separate standalone Rent page — rental listings should be handled within the existing Property Listing Page via filters
Adding new authentication or user role changes
Modifying the admin panel approval workflow
